successCriteria.criterion: A search text input appears at the top of IssuesSection, below the filter/actions row
Typing in the search input filters issues by title, body text, and label names (case-insensitive)
Search is debounced at 300ms to avoid excessive re-renders
A clear button (x) appears when the search input has text, and clicking it resets the search
A match count is shown (e.g., '5 of 12') when a search query is active
The same search filter is applied to KanbanBoard cards across all columns
Search input styling matches the existing dark theme (consistent with filter dropdown and other inputs)
pnpm typecheck passes with no errors

phases.title: Add search state to issuesStore and implement search UI in IssuesSection
verification: Search input appears in IssuesSection below the filter/actions row
Typing filters issues by title, body, and label name (case-insensitive)
Filtering is debounced at 300ms (typing rapidly does not cause per-keystroke updates)
Clear button appears when input has text and resets the search immediately
Match count (e.g., '5 of 12') appears when search query is active
Empty state message changes to 'No issues matching ...' when search has no results but issues exist
CollapsibleSection badge still shows total issue count (not filtered count)

phases.title: Apply search filter to KanbanBoard columns
verification: Typing in the IssuesSection search input also filters kanban board cards
Search filter composes with the release filter (both active simultaneously)
Completed column items are also filtered by search
Clearing the search shows all issues again in both views
Column counts update to reflect filtered results
